title: Intel joins Elon Musk's TeraFab project — 'Intel is proud to join the Terafab project with SpaceX, xAI, and Tesla to help refactor silicon fab technology'
summary: As Intel joins Elon Musk's TeraFab project, Lip-Bu Tan expects Elon Musk to reimagine the semiconductor industry.

title: GitHub user creates open-source Nvidia GeForce Now client alternative — removes tracking, telemetry, and AFK limitations
summary: Zortos293 uploaded an open-source GeForce Now client to GitHub, allowing gamers to connect to Nvidia's service without being tracked by the tech giant.

title: Framework warns of even more rising RAM and SSD prices through 2026 as memory crisis persists — some reprieve as prices plateau in latest monthly update
summary: The company is already adjusting pricing for high-capacity SSDs and memory-heavy configurations as supply costs increase.

title: Asus Zenbook A16 review: Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme is a strong chip in a so-so package
summary: The Asus Zenbook A16 is a lightweight housing for Qualcomm's Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme, but comes with compromises in build quality and battery life.

title: Broadcom to supply Anthropic with 3.5 gigawatts of Google TPU capacity from 2027 — Claude pioneer says its annual revenue run rate has passed $30 billion
summary: Broadcom disclosed in a securities filing on Monday that it’ll supply Anthropic with roughly 3.5 gigawatts of Google TPU capacity starting in 2027.

title: Intel reportedly in talks with Google and Amazon over advanced packaging — major customers could take advantage of EMIB-T later this year
summary: Intel is understood to be in active talks with Google and Amazon to provide advanced chip packaging services for their custom AI ASICs.

title: Firmus, the ‘Southgate’ AI datacenter builder backed by Nvidia, hits $5.5B valuation
summary: Nvidia-backed Asia AI data center provider Firmus has now raised $1.35 billion in six months.

title: Intel signs on to Elon Musk’s Terafab chips project
summary: Intel will join SpaceX and Tesla in an effort to build a new U.S. semiconductor factory in Texas, although the scope of its contributions are unclear.

title: Anthropic debuts preview of powerful new AI model Mythos in new cybersecurity initiative
summary: The new model will be used by a small number of high-profile companies to engage in defensive cybersecurity work.

title: Uber is the latest to be won over by Amazon’s AI chips
summary: Uber is expanding its AWS contract to run more of its ride-sharing features on Amazon's chips. This is a thumb-of-the nose at Oracle and Google.

title: Anthropic ups compute deal with Google and Broadcom amid skyrocketing demand
summary: Anthropic bulked up its compute deal with Google and Broadcom as the company has seen its run-rate revenue surge to $30 billion.
